title: Medical Coder
description: Moderna, the mRNA biotechnology pioneer, seeks a Medical Coder to support clinical trial documentation and regulatory compliance for our vaccine development programs. Working hybrid in Cambridge, you'll code clinical trial data, maintain regulatory databases, and ensure accurate documentation for FDA submissions. Join our team advancing mRNA therapeutics.
responsibilities: Code clinical trial adverse events and medical diagnoses using MedDRA and ICD-10
Review and validate source documents for clinical trial accuracy
Maintain regulatory databases and audit trails for FDA compliance
Ensure data integrity and completeness in clinical databases
Collaborate with clinical operations and regulatory teams

requirements.education: Associate degree or certification in medical coding, or high school diploma with relevant training
skills: Clinical trial knowledge and regulatory requirements
Attention to detail and data accuracy
certifications: AAPC, AHIMA, or clinical trial coding certification preferred

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision insurance
